notes: Point fix only: no rebuild of the Clean V3 menu tree.
Stops banner text/link/button saves from creating a second full menu card; it edits the active banner menu where possible and sends only a small confirmation.
Adds /api/comments/banner and /debug/banner-live for the configured per-post banner.
Injects a tiny client renderer into public/app.js at runtime so the saved banner appears inside the comments OpenApp screen.
OpenApp comments launch and existing comments UI remain untouched.
